stories.title: Nvidia earnings call drama: Will Jensen Huang talk 'Trump' and China chips after Xi summit?
stories.summary: Both Nvidia's earnings and its commentary on its financial report are expected to be big tests for U.S. equities.

stories.title: Anthropic Sends Jolt Through Market for Buying Shares in Hot Pre-IPO Startups
stories.summary: In the moments after Anthropic expanded a ban on popular ways to buy its shares, investor chatrooms around the world lit up. “Are we screwed?” one person wrote in a WhatsApp chat for family offices with several hundred members. Similar questions reverberated more publicly across X, Reddit and Chinese-language social media, as investors worried whether their shares in the artificial intelligence de

stories.title: NextEra strikes megadeal with Dominion to create $420bn US utility
stories.summary: Tie-up would create power behemoth at a time of booming demand for electricity for AI data centres

stories.title: Few Foreign Ships Seen in Hormuz Amid Reports of Iran’s Insurance Plan
stories.summary: The Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed to commercial shipping, with maritime traffic reduced to a trickle and dominated by Iranian-linked vessels. There were few notable foreign-affiliated movements amid reports of Iran’s Bitcoin-backed insurance program for shipping companies willing to transit the waterway.

stories.title: Jitters on oil and bond markets as US-Iran peace talks stall
stories.summary: Energy markets have been on a wild ride as the key Strait of Hormuz waterway remains effectively closed.

stories.title: Tankers Entering Hormuz During Iran War Are Making Their Way Out
stories.summary: Almost all large non-Iranian tankers that have entered the Persian Gulf during the war appear to have successfully exited with a cargo, underscoring the emergence of a small group of shipowners willing to risk crossing the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.title: NextEra Energy to buy Dominion in deal that unites two key players in race to power AI data centers
stories.summary: Dominion powers the world's largest data center market in northern Virginia. NextEra is the biggest renewable energy developer in the U.S.

stories.title: Bank of England does not need to hike interest rates, says IMF — it may even need to cut
stories.summary: The Bank of England is expected to hold and even potentially hike interest rates this year in response to resurgent inflation sparked by the Iran war.

stories.title: Musk’s xAI Fails to Pay Staff $420 for Giving Their Tax Returns to Grok
stories.summary: Elon Musk’s xAI asked employees earlier this year to offer up their own tax returns as training data for the company’s Grok chatbot, promising a $420 payment as incentive for doing so. Two months later, those payments still haven’t materialized.

stories.title: Pope to Launch Encyclical on AI Alongside Anthropic Co-Founder
stories.summary: Pope Leo XIV’s launch of his first encyclical focusing on artificial intelligence next week will feature an unexpected guest: Christopher Olah, co-founder of Anthropic.

stories.title: Google’s Own AI Researchers Jockey for Access to Its Computing
stories.summary: In the race to build the infrastructure that powers artificial intelligence, Alphabet Inc.’s Google has an enviable position: The company has a healthy cloud computing business, makes its own chips, and has struck deals to share them with companies like Anthropic PBC and Meta Platforms Inc.

stories.title: Iran Starts Bitcoin-Backed Ship Insurance for Hormuz Strait
stories.summary: Iran has started a Bitcoin-backed insurance service for Iranian shipping companies that want to transit the Strait of Hormuz, the semi-official Fars news agency reported, citing documents obtained from the country’s Ministry of Economy and Financial Affairs.

stories.title: NextEra to Buy Dominion for $67 Billion to Create US Power Giant
stories.summary: NextEra Energy Inc. agreed to pay about $67 billion in stock for Dominion Energy Inc. in the biggest power acquisition ever, creating a giant utility extending from Florida to the artificial intelligence data centers clustered in Virginia.

stories.summary: European stocks rebounded on Monday as investors react to the latest developments in the U.S.-Iran war.

Either inflation is going to be high for a long time, and this is something that has changed in the past week or two, or 10-year yields have gone a little too far. stories.summary: A new era of elevated borrowing costs is potentially underway as war-driven inflation angst intensifies in the US bond market, sending 30-year yields toward a two-decade high above 5%. Guneet Dhingra, Head of US Rates Strategy at BNP Paribas, discusses the recent yield surge and why 5% may become the new 4%. (Source: Bloomberg)
